text: Here in this minimalist, open space, I am reminded of the emptiness and possibility that an unfinished canvas presents. The bean bags and soft lighting invite contemplation; it feels tranquil but also a little lonely. Moving into the vibrant, immersive R&D display, the dynamic colors and thoughtful installations awaken my curiosity and excitement about human creativity and technological advancement. I feel inspired to reflect upon the intersection of art, research, and progress—how we shape the world, and how it shapes us.
